articles.title: One Battle After Another’s big night: Key takeaways from the 2026 Oscars - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Paul Thomas Anderson’s political chase film earned six Oscars, beating the vampire thriller Sinners, which scored four.

articles.title: Michael B. Jordan wins best actor for ‘Sinners,’ taking home his first Oscar in popular victory - AP News
articles.description: Michael B. Jordan has won the best-actor Oscar for his role in “Sinners.” Last year’s winner, Adrien Brody, announced Jordan’s name Sunday night, setting off a wild celebration inside the Dolby Theatre. Jordan plays identical twins Smoke and Stack in the supe…

articles.title: ‘Secret Lives of Mormon Wives’ Production Paused Amid Taylor & Baby Daddy Drama - TMZ
articles.description: Production on “The Secret Lives of Mormon Wives” has hit an unexpected pause … and it's all due to a heated blowup between two of the main cast members, TMZ has learned.

articles.title: 'KPop Demon Hunters' "Golden" Team Cut Off At Oscars: They React - Deadline
